title: Strike Ranking, Top-5 Finder, and Liquidity Trap Detector
objective: Rank option strikes every 60 seconds using confidence scoring, produce top CE/PE candidates, and detect liquidity traps.
scope: Confidence score calculation from analytics factors.
Top 5 CE and top 5 PE ranking output.
Liquidity trap detection (OI clusters, volume spikes, sweeps, gamma exposure).
deliverables: Scoring engine with explainability payload (factor contribution).
Top-5 ranking endpoint and stream publisher.
Liquidity detector with bull/bear trap alerts and heatmap data.
success_metrics: Ranking cycle completes in under 1 second after analytics inputs are ready.
Trap alerts include reason codes and confidence.
risks: Score instability under noisy market intervals.
open_questions: Should confidence score weights be static or strategy-specific?
How to calibrate trap detector thresholds per index?
